data.title: TEST: Link With Details
data.content:
<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Default / Minimal","description":"Only required fields populated. Tests empty state handling for optional fields."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/link-with-details {"headline":"Get Started","description":"Learn more about our programs.","buttons":[{"title":"Learn More","url":"#","variation":"tertiary"}]} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Full Content","description":"All fields populated with realistic content."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/link-with-details {"headline":"Undergraduate Programs","description":"Explore our diverse range of undergraduate degree programs designed to prepare you for a successful career in your chosen field.","buttons":[{"title":"View Programs","url":"#","variation":"tertiary"}]} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Long Content - Edge Case","description":"Excessive text length to test overflow and wrapping behavior."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/link-with-details {"headline":"This Is an Extremely Long Headline That Tests How the Block Handles Overflow When Content Exceeds Typical Lengths","description":"Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat. Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur. Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident, sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit anim id est laborum. Sed ut perspiciatis unde omnis iste natus error sit voluptatem.","buttons":[{"title":"Read the Full Details About This Program","url":"#","variation":"tertiary"}]} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Consecutive Blocks - Border Separator","description":"Multiple LinkWithDetails blocks stacked consecutively. Second and subsequent blocks should show border-top, margin-top, and padding-top."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/link-with-details {"headline":"First Program","description":"This is the first item in a consecutive list. No border-top on this one.","buttons":[{"title":"Explore","url":"#","variation":"tertiary"}]} /-->
	<!-- wp:takt/link-with-details {"headline":"Second Program","description":"This block follows another of the same type and should display a top border separator with spacing.","buttons":[{"title":"Explore","url":"#","variation":"tertiary"}]} /-->
	<!-- wp:takt/link-with-details {"headline":"Third Program","description":"Another consecutive block, also with the top border separator.","buttons":[{"title":"Explore","url":"#","variation":"tertiary"}]} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Empty Optional Fields","description":"Tests shouldDisplay() behavior when description is empty."} -->

<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->
